privileged_info_summary: The task requires creating a discount schema named 'Bulk Order Incentive 2024' in iDempiere with type 'B' (Breaks, representing tiered quantity-based discounts). The discount schema contains four break tiers: quantity 10 with 5% discount, quantity 25 with 8% discount, quantity 50 with 12% discount, and quantity 100 with 15% discount. All metadata values are consistent with the task specification and are correctly referenced throughout the setup, export, and verification scripts. The data is synthetic, task-specified values rather than real business data from an external source.
